generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes, and implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in component type contracts.
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names when defining ranges.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` to enclose AGREE contracts.
Stateful equations should use initialized temporal recurrence: `0.0 -> pre(t) + step`.
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not encode AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions unless they are exposed as ports or constants.
